items.title: Dehns expands patent litigation practice with former Marks & Clerk partner
items.title_zh: Dehns吸纳前Marks & Clerk合伙人扩充专利诉讼团队
items.title_en: Dehns hires former Marks & Clerk partner to expand patent litigation team
items.summary: Lawyer Graham Burnett-Hall (56) comes from UK law firm Shoosmiths, which he joined two years ago. At the full service firm, he advised on a variety of IP matters, including transactional, commercial and litigation. For example, he was involved in a case for Brightwake against BSN at the UPC. Previously he worked at Marks & […] The post Dehns expands patent litigation practice with former Marks & Clerk partner appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国律所Dehns宣布聘请Graham Burnett-Hall以加强其专利诉讼业务。Burnett-Hall此前在Shoosmiths工作两年，处理各类知识产权事务。他曾在统一专利法院（UPC）代理Brightwake诉BSN案，此前曾任职于Marks & Clerk。
items.ai_summary_en: UK firm Dehns has appointed Graham Burnett-Hall to strengthen its patent litigation practice. Burnett-Hall joins from Shoosmiths, where he served for two years advising on transactional, commercial, and litigation IP matters. His recent experience includes acting for Brightwake against BSN in proceedings at the Unified Patent Court (UPC). Prior to his tenure at Shoosmiths, he was a partner at Marks & Clerk. This recruitment adds specific UPC litigation capability to Dehns’ existing portfolio of services, reflecting continued movement of experienced practitioners within the UK intellectual property sector.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This appointment highlights the ongoing demand for practitioners with direct Unified Patent Court experience among leading UK firms. For rights holders, it signals increased availability of specialized counsel for cross-border patent disputes. Firms are actively integrating lawyers with proven UPC track records to enhance their competitive positioning in the evolving European litigation landscape.

items.title: UPC: Rethinking inventive step - GJE
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院：重新审视创造性评估
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Emerging Methodology for Assessing Inventive Step
items.summary: As UPC litigation gathers pace, recent Court of Appeal decisions are shaping the assessment of inventive step.
items.ai_summary_zh: 随着统一专利法院诉讼加速，其上诉庭近期判决正塑造创造性评估标准。文章总结UPC新兴方法，指出其与欧洲专利局框架的差异，并探讨这些差异对专利撰写、审查及诉讼策略的影响。
items.ai_summary_en: As litigation before the Unified Patent Court accelerates, recent Court of Appeal decisions are defining the assessment of core patentability issues, particularly inventive step. While this concept is familiar to practitioners, the UPC is developing a distinct methodology that differs from the European Patent Office framework. This analysis summarizes the emerging judicial approach, highlighting key divergences from EPO practice. It further considers how these differences may influence patent drafting, prosecution, and litigation strategies within the UPC system. Rights holders and counsel must navigate this evolving landscape as the court establishes its own precedents for determining technical contribution and non-obviousness in patent disputes.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners should note that UPC inventive step assessment is not identical to EPO examination practice. Recent appellate rulings indicate a developing judicial standard that requires adjusted argumentation strategies. Monitoring these precedents is essential for accurate validity forecasting and effective portfolio management in the unitary patent system.

items.ai_core_points_en: ["UPC Court of Appeal decisions are shaping the specific assessment standards for inventive step in ongoing litigation.", "The UPC is developing a distinct methodology for inventive step that diverges from established EPO frameworks.", "These judicial differences impact patent drafting, prosecution strategies, and litigation approaches before the Unified Patent Court."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["统一专利法院已形成区别于欧洲专利局的创造性评估独立方法论", "上诉庭判决正逐步确立该平台处理核心可专利性问题的司法标准", "需持续观察新方法论对专利撰写、审查答复及诉讼策略的具体影响"]

The UPC is developing a distinct methodology for inventive step that diverges from established EPO frameworks.
These judicial differences impact patent drafting, prosecution strategies, and litigation approaches before the Unified Patent Court.

What to monitor: Track subsequent Court of Appeal judgments to identify consistent patterns in how technical problems and solutions are evaluated.

items.title: Life Sciences disputes: navigating causation and damages in an uncertain world
items.title_zh: 生命科学争议：在不确定世界中应对因果关系与损害赔偿
items.title_en: Navigating Causation and Damages in UK Life Sciences Disputes
items.summary: As part of London International Disputes Week 2026, Bristows and Oxera hosted a discussion on causation, counterfactuals and damages in life sciences di...
items.ai_summary_zh: 作为2026年伦敦国际争议周的一部分，Bristows与Oxera举办研讨会，讨论生命科学争议中的因果关系、反事实情景及损害赔偿。专家指出，该领域研发高风险及监管复杂，使得假设情景评估极具挑战。确定相关反事实情景是争议难点，经济证据有助于评估初步禁令等场景下的定价与市场份额问题。
items.ai_summary_en: During London International Disputes Week 2026, Bristows and Oxera discussed causation and damages in life sciences disputes. The panel highlighted challenges in assessing counterfactuals given the sector's high R&D risk and regulatory complexity. Determining the relevant counterfactual is critical when evaluating failed collaborations, supply disruptions, or competitor market entry. Economic evidence helps tribunals assess pricing, market share, and competitive behavior, particularly in preliminary injunction contexts. The discussion emphasized grounding analyses in contemporaneous documents and factual evidence to construct clear narratives linking alleged breaches to claimed losses. Clarifying expert assumptions remains essential for decision-makers navigating competing economic models in uncertain commercial environments.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: For rights holders and defendants, robust economic modeling supported by contemporaneous records is vital for proving causation. Practitioners should ensure expert assumptions are transparent to assist tribunals in navigating uncertainty. Monitor how UK courts weigh competing counterfactual scenarios in high-stakes life sciences litigation.

items.title: Protéger les données dans l’IA : quels enseignements tirer des récentes décisions américaines ?
items.title_zh: 保护AI数据：从近期美国判决中汲取何种教训？
items.title_en: Protéger les données dans l’IA : quels enseignements tirer des récentes décisions américaines ?
items.summary: Introduction Contrairement à une idée reçue, la jurisprudence américaine sur l’usage de l’intelligence artificielle n’est pas une réalité réservée aux géants de la Silicon Valley. Elle constitue un laboratoire jurisprudentiel dont les enseignements ont vocation à irriguer les pratiques européennes, notamment en matière de droit d’auteur, de confidentialité des données
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文指出，关于人工智能使用的美国判例法并非硅谷巨头专属，而是一个旨在滋养欧洲实践（特别是版权和数据保密领域）的判例实验室。文章意在分析美国近期判决对欧洲相关法律实践的借鉴意义。
items.ai_insight_zh: 需持续观察美国AI版权与数据判例如何具体渗透至欧盟法律解释中。重点关注跨境数据训练合法性及版权归属在欧洲司法辖区的潜在联动效应，监测欧美在AI监管路径上的异同对合规策略的影响。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["美国AI相关判例法构成一个判例实验室，其教训旨在影响欧洲实践", "重点关注的欧洲实践领域包括版权法及数据保密相关规定"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["监测美国AI判例对欧盟版权及数据保护实践的实质性影响", "关注跨法域下AI训练数据合法性认定的差异与趋同趋势", "观察欧洲法院在引用或区分美国判例时的司法逻辑变化"]

items.title: G 1/26 – patent claim loses weight, leading to second referral on claim interpretation
items.title_zh: G 1/26：权利要求权重降低引发二次转介
items.title_en: G 1/26 – patent claim loses weight, leading to second referral on claim interpretation
items.summary: It is less than a year since the Enlarged Board of Appeal issued the landmark decision G 1/24 on the issue of claim interpretation. Already in this time, a divergence has arisen between the Boards on how exactly to implement this decision.
items.ai_summary_zh: 继G 1/24裁决后不到一年，EPO各上诉委员会在实施该决定时出现分歧。技术上诉委员会3.3.05在T 873/24案中向扩大上诉委员会提出新转介G 1/26，核心争议在于说明书特征是否可读入权利要求，以及在评估新增事项时如何解释权利要求术语。
items.ai_insight_zh: 此次转介反映了EPO内部对权利要求解释标准的不确定性。需关注扩大上诉委员会如何澄清说明书对权利要求范围的限制作用，以及其对新增事项审查的影响。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO上诉委员会间就G 1/24的实施产生分歧，特别是说明书特征读入权利要求的问题", "委员会3.3.05在T 873/24案中向扩大上诉委员会提出关于权利要求解释与新增事项…", "案件焦点涉及钛氮比特征未明确是重量比还是摩尔比，专利权人主张依据说明书解释为重量比"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["G 1/26将澄清说明书在权利要求解释中的具体权重，影响专利确权稳定性", "需观察扩大上诉委员会对“权利要求作为起点”原则的进一步界定", "后续应关注该裁决对涉及数值范围或参数限定专利的新增事项审查标准的影响"]

(5 € le résumé, censé vous éviter de lire, par exemple, les 416 pages du Traité théologico-politique de Spinoza).  Elle rachète les droits à des […] L’article CLASSES PREPA, TIKTOK ET CONTREFAÇON est apparu en premier sur BLIP! .

items.title: Just launched | Bristows UPC Case Tracker
items.title_zh: Bristows 推出 UPC Case Tracker，帮助跟踪统一专利法院判例
items.title_en: Bristows Launches UPC Case Tracker for Monitoring Key Decisions
items.summary: We are delighted to announce the new Bristows UPC case tracker. Since the UPC launched in June 2023, the volume of decisions has grown rapidly, making i...
items.ai_summary_zh: Bristows 宣布上线新的 UPC Case Tracker，旨在帮助用户在统一专利法院判决数量快速增长的背景下，更便捷地检索和分析关键裁判。该工具支持按临时禁令、跨境管辖、创造性等议题筛选，并配有简明摘要、原始判决链接以及音频摘要等辅助内容。
items.ai_summary_en: Bristows has launched a new UPC Case Tracker to assist users in navigating the rapidly growing volume of Unified Patent Court decisions since its June 2023 inception. The tool facilitates the identification and analysis of key rulings across diverse legal issues, including preliminary injunctions, cross-border jurisdiction, and inventive step. Featuring various filters and tags, it allows targeted exploration of relevant areas. Building on the firm’s weekly Irides global patent litigation update, the tracker provides concise, expert-written summaries with links to full judgments. Audio summaries are also available for accessible consumption. The platform consolidates these resources alongside recent UPC blog posts, podcasts, and videos, offering a centralized hub for staying informed on UPC developments.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这不是司法裁判本身，但对欧洲专利从业者和企业法务具有实用价值。随着 UPC 判例快速累积，谁能更高效地结构化检索裁判趋势，谁就更容易在禁令、无效、证据和跨境救济问题上形成更快的策略判断。
items.ai_insight_en: As UPC jurisprudence expands, structured monitoring tools become essential for efficient legal research. This tracker offers practitioners a centralized resource for tracking procedural and substantive trends. By providing curated summaries and audio formats, it supports quicker assimilation of case law developments. For in-house teams and external counsel, such tools help maintain awareness of evolving standards in cross-border enforcement and validity challenges without requiring manual review of every judgment.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Bristows 推出新的 UPC Case Tracker 工具。", "该工具面向持续增长的 UPC 判例，提供检索、筛选和摘要功能。", "覆盖主题包括临时禁令、跨境管辖和创造性等关键争议。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["New tracker addresses rapid growth in UPC decisions since the court launched in June 2023.", "Tool enables filtering by key issues such as preliminary injunctions, jurisdiction, and inventive step.", "Features expert summaries, audio options, and links to judgments alongside broader UPC content."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC 判例数据库和二次整理工具正成为实务基础设施。", "争议热点的标签化检索有助于缩短诉讼准备时间。", "企业法务可将此类工具作为监测 UPC 风险与机会的轻量入口。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Centralized access to curated UPC summaries helps rights holders track legal trends affecting portfolio enforcement and defense strategies efficiently.", "Practice note: Expert-written summaries and audio formats reduce time spent on initial case screening, allowing counsel to focus on high-impact precedents.", "What to monitor: Watch for updates in tagging categories as the UPC docket grows, particularly regarding emerging hotspots in jurisdiction and injunction standards."]

Tool enables filtering by key issues such as preliminary injunctions, jurisdiction, and inventive step.
Features expert summaries, audio options, and links to judgments alongside broader UPC content.

Practice note: Expert-written summaries and audio formats reduce time spent on initial case screening, allowing counsel to focus on high-impact precedents.
What to monitor: Watch for updates in tagging categories as the UPC docket grows, particularly regarding emerging hotspots in jurisdiction and injunction standards.

items.title: Le hashtag peut-il constituer une contrefaçon de marque ?
items.title_zh: Dreyfus：社交媒体中的 hashtag 也可能构成商标侵权
items.title_en: Can the use of a hashtag constitute trademark infringement under EU law
items.summary: Introduction Dans un environnement numérique où les réseaux sociaux dictent les stratégies de communication des entreprises, l’usage des hashtags est devenu quasi systématique. Or, cette pratique en apparence anodine peut, selon les circonstances, empiéter sur les droits privatifs d’un tiers. La question de savoir si un hashtag est susceptible de
items.ai_summary_zh: Dreyfus 文章讨论，在社交媒体传播几乎默认使用 hashtag 的环境下，标签使用也可能触及第三方商标权。文章指出，hashtag 并不会天然脱离商标法审查；当其被用于商业推广、引导流量或制造与品牌的联系时，仍可能构成对他人商标专用权的侵害，具体取决于使用语境和公众感知。
items.ai_summary_en: This analysis examines whether the systematic use of hashtags in corporate social media communication may infringe third-party trademark rights. While often viewed as benign, such usage can encroach on exclusive rights depending on specific circumstances. The article explores the legal question of whether a hashtag is capable of constituting trademark infringement, highlighting that digital communication practices are subject to intellectual property constraints when they interfere with the proprietary rights of others.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这类问题对品牌营销和社交媒体合规都很实际。企业不能把 hashtag 当作纯技术性标签看待，而应把其纳入商标清查、平台投放审核和网红合作指引，尤其是在竞品比较、流量截取和二级传播内容中。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders should recognize that hashtags are not neutral technical tools but potential vectors for trademark conflict. European practitioners must assess whether specific hashtag uses create a link to protected marks. Monitoring digital campaigns for unauthorized brand associations remains essential for maintaining portfolio integrity and avoiding inadvertent infringement claims in online environments.

Infringement risk depends on whether the practice encroaches on third-party exclusive rights.

items.title: UK IPO launches new guidance to help consumers spot fakes
items.title_zh: CITMA：UKIPO 发布二手时尚反假货指南，Vinted 参与支持
items.title_en: UK IPO Launches Guidance to Help Consumers Identify Counterfeit Second-Hand Fashion
items.summary: The UK Intellectual Property Office (UK IPO) has launched new guidance to help consumers identify counterfeit goods when shopping for second-hand fashion online.
items.ai_summary_zh: CITMA 报道称，英国知识产权局发布新指南，帮助消费者在网上购买二手时尚商品时识别假货。该指南由在线平台 Vinted 支持，属于 UKIPO “Second-hand, not second best” 宣传活动的一部分。报道引用 UKIPO 研究称，过去一年在线购买二手服装的人中，四分之一曾在不知情情况下买到假货，年轻消费者在二手平台遇到假冒设计师商品的比例更高。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has released new consumer guidance to identify counterfeit goods in the online second-hand fashion market. Developed with support from resale platform Vinted, this initiative supports the 'Second-hand, not second best' campaign addressing rising counterfeit prevalence. Recent UK IPO research indicates that one in four online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeits in the past year, with younger demographics disproportionately affected. The guidance advises consumers to verify seller profiles, scrutinize product imagery and descriptions for consistency, compare branding against genuine items, and utilize available platform verification tools. This response aims to mitigate negative consumer experiences, such as poor quality and refund disputes, which are increasingly deterring participation in the growing pre-loved sector.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该动态不是新法律规则，但对品牌执法和平台治理有现实意义。随着二手时尚市场扩大，权利人需要把 resale 平台监测、卖家画像、平台验证工具和消费者教育纳入反假货策略，而不是只依赖传统下架投诉。
items.ai_insight_en: This initiative highlights the strategic shift toward consumer education and platform collaboration in anti-counterfeiting efforts. For rights holders, it underscores the necessity of integrating resale platforms into brand protection strategies beyond traditional takedown mechanisms. Monitoring how platforms implement verification tools and how consumers respond to these educational resources will be critical for assessing future enforcement efficacy and market integrity in the secondary goods sector.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UKIPO 发布面向二手时尚网购的反假货消费者指南。", "指南由 Vinted 支持，并纳入 UKIPO 新宣传活动。", "UKIPO 研究显示二手平台假货风险正在影响消费者信任。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UK IPO and Vinted launched guidance to help consumers spot fakes in online second-hand fashion markets.", "Research shows one in four recent online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeit items.", "Guidance recommends checking seller profiles, reviewing photos, comparing labels, and using platform verification tools."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["二手平台已成为英国反假货执法和消费者教育的新重点。", "品牌方应将 resale 平台纳入常规监测范围。", "平台验证和买家保护工具会成为反假货治理的重要证据来源。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders should align internal brand protection strategies with emerging consumer education initiatives on resale platforms.", "Practice note: Effective anti-counterfeiting now requires monitoring secondary markets and leveraging platform-specific verification and buyer protection tools.", "What to monitor: Track adoption rates of verification tools and consumer sentiment shifts regarding trust in second-hand fashion marketplaces."]
core_points_en: UK IPO and Vinted launched guidance to help consumers spot fakes in online second-hand fashion markets.
Research shows one in four recent online second-hand clothing buyers unknowingly purchased counterfeit items.
Guidance recommends checking seller profiles, reviewing photos, comparing labels, and using platform verification tools.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders should align internal brand protection strategies with emerging consumer education initiatives on resale platforms.
Practice note: Effective anti-counterfeiting now requires monitoring secondary markets and leveraging platform-specific verification and buyer protection tools.
What to monitor: Track adoption rates of verification tools and consumer sentiment shifts regarding trust in second-hand fashion marketplaces.

items.title_zh: 混淆风险评估及欧盟公众对英语术语理解推定的界限
items.title_en: L’appréciation du risque de confusion et les limites de la présomption de compréhension des termes anglais par le public de l’Union

T-209/25 L’appréciation du risque de confusion au sens de l’article 8, paragraphe 1, sous b), du règlement (UE) 2017/1001 repose sur une analyse globale de la perception des signes […] L’article L’appréciation du risque de confusion et les limites de la présomption de compréhension des termes anglais par le public de l’Union est a
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析了欧盟普通法院第一审判庭于2026年2月11日作出的Nutris We care about you, SL诉EUIPO案（T-209/25）判决。重点探讨了依据《欧盟商标条例》第8(1)(b)条评估混淆风险时，对欧盟公众理解英语术语的推定存在的局限性，强调需基于对标志感知的整体分析。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该分析提示在欧盟商标异议或诉讼中，不能简单假定所有相关公众均能理解英语词汇含义。实务中需结合具体市场证据，审慎评估英语术语在特定成员国或泛欧层面的实际认知度，以支撑混淆可能性的主张或抗辩。

items.title: Peut-on se prévaloir des archives de Wayback Machine comme moyen de preuve sur Internet ?
items.title_zh: Dreyfus：Wayback Machine 可作为网络证据，但采信条件需谨慎把握
items.title_en: Admissibility of Wayback Machine Archives as Evidence in IP Disputes
items.summary: Introduction La preuve numérique constitue aujourd’hui un enjeu stratégique majeur en matière de contentieux de la propriété intellectuelle. Face à la volatilité des contenus en ligne, la Wayback Machine s’impose comme un outil incontournable pour démontrer l’existence passée d’une page web. Toutefois, sa valeur juridique demeure encadrée et conditionnée, imposant
items.ai_summary_zh: Dreyfus 文章指出，在知识产权争议中，面对网页内容易变和下线的现实，Wayback Machine 已成为证明网页历史状态的重要工具。但文章同时强调，这类归档证据的法律价值并非当然成立，法院通常会关注其取得方式、完整性、时间点以及是否有其他证据相互印证。
items.ai_summary_en: Digital evidence is a significant factor in intellectual property litigation due to the volatility of online content. The Wayback Machine serves as a key tool for demonstrating the past existence of web pages. However, its legal value is not automatic. Admissibility remains subject to specific conditions and judicial scrutiny. Rights holders must understand that archived snapshots require careful validation to be accepted as proof. The source indicates that while the tool is indispensable for establishing historical online presence, courts impose constraints on how such evidence is evaluated and weighed in proceedings.
items.ai_insight_zh: 这对线上侵权、商标使用和先使用证据都很实用。权利人和被诉方都不应只依赖单一截图或归档链接，而应同步准备时间戳、爬取记录、公证、服务器日志或平台回执，以提高网络证据的可采性和证明力。
items.ai_insight_en: European practitioners should note that Wayback Machine outputs are not self-authenticating. Courts may require corroboration regarding integrity and capture dates. Relying solely on public archives carries evidentiary risk without additional verification steps or supporting documentation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["Wayback Machine 常被用于证明网页过去的存在状态和内容。", "其证据价值在 IP 诉讼中具有现实意义。", "法院对其采信通常附带真实性、完整性和佐证条件。"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Wayback Machine archives help demonstrate the past existence of volatile web content.", "Legal value of digital archives is conditional and subject to judicial assessment.", "Admissibility requires meeting specific evidentiary standards beyond simple page retrieval."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["数字证据保全应采用多来源交叉证明策略。", "Wayback Machine 更适合作为证据链的一部分而非唯一证据。", "品牌和版权执法团队需要建立更标准化的取证流程。"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Archived web pages can support claims of prior use or infringement but lack guaranteed admissibility.", "Practice note: Corroborate Wayback Machine snapshots with timestamps, notarized records, or server logs to strengthen evidentiary weight.", "What to monitor: Track recent case law defining the threshold for accepting third-party web archives as valid proof."]
core_points_en: Wayback Machine archives help demonstrate the past existence of volatile web content.
Legal value of digital archives is conditional and subject to judicial assessment.
Admissibility requires meeting specific evidentiary standards beyond simple page retrieval.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Archived web pages can support claims of prior use or infringement but lack guaranteed admissibility.
Practice note: Corroborate Wayback Machine snapshots with timestamps, notarized records, or server logs to strengthen evidentiary weight.
What to monitor: Track recent case law defining the threshold for accepting third-party web archives as valid proof.

items.title: Scotland’s first IP-backed lending product: further evidence that intellectual property is now a mainstream business asset
items.title_zh: 苏格兰推出首个IP担保贷款：IP成主流商业资产
items.title_en: Royal Bank of Scotland Launches First IP-Backed Lending Product in Scotland
items.summary: For years, innovative businesses have been told their IP is valuable, now banks are starting to treat it that way. The launch of the...
items.ai_summary_zh: 苏格兰皇家银行推出苏格兰首个知识产权担保贷款产品，额度25万至1000万英镑。此举依托《2023年苏格兰动产交易法》，允许以IP为抵押。此前NatWest集团已在英格兰和威尔士实施类似模式。该发展表明银行开始将IP视为核心商业资产，为轻资产创新企业提供除股权融资外的新债务融资途径。
items.ai_summary_en: The Royal Bank of Scotland has launched Scotland’s first intellectual property-backed lending product, offering loans between £250,000 and £10 million. This initiative enables businesses to secure debt finance using IP assets as collateral, reducing reliance on traditional fixed assets like property or machinery. The product leverages the Moveable Transactions (Scotland) Act 2023, which modernized secured transaction laws to facilitate the use of IP as security. It expands upon NatWest Group’s existing IP-lending model in England and Wales, signaling a broader recognition of IP as a mainstream commercial asset for technology, life sciences, and creative sectors seeking alternatives to equity funding.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This development underscores the financial maturation of IP, allowing asset-light innovators to access debt finance without equity dilution. For rights holders, it highlights the commercial necessity of maintaining clear IP ownership records and robust valuation frameworks to meet lender due diligence requirements in secured transactions.

items.title: New UPC ADR centre could have major implications for patent disputes
items.title_zh: IAM：UPC 专利 ADR 中心启动在即，但其权限边界仍留待实践检验
items.title_en: New UPC ADR Centre Launch Raises Questions on Scope and Impact
items.summary: But some important questions remain over the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre’s scope
items.ai_summary_zh: IAM 报道称，统一专利法院框架下新的专利调解与仲裁中心可能对专利争议处理产生重大影响，但其权限范围和实际适用边界仍存在重要未决问题。就现有片段看，文章重点并非宣布一项既定程序结论，而是提示该 ADR 机制有望成为欧洲专利争议中的新变量。
items.ai_summary_en: IAM Media reports that the new Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre under the Unified Patent Court framework could significantly influence patent dispute resolution. However, the article highlights that critical uncertainties remain regarding the Centre’s operational scope and jurisdictional boundaries. While the establishment of this alternative dispute resolution mechanism represents a notable development in the European patent landscape, its precise role and interaction with existing litigation pathways are not yet fully defined. Rights holders and practitioners must await further clarification on how the Centre will function in practice to assess its potential utility in managing patent conflicts within the UPC system.
items.ai_insight_zh: 对企业和代理团队而言，真正的关注点不只是 ADR 中心“开张”，而是它将如何与 UPC 诉讼、FRAND/许可争议和保密需求结合。如果中心能提供可执行且与法院程序顺畅衔接的路径，它可能改变部分欧洲专利争议的谈判顺序和解决结构。
items.ai_insight_en: Given the limited public details, the primary focus for rights holders is monitoring the Centre's procedural rules. The actual impact on dispute resolution depends on how the scope is defined in practice. Parties should observe early cases to determine if this forum offers a viable alternative to standard UPC litigation for specific types of patent disagreements.

items.title: UPC Appeal Rates and Case Distribution: Europe Is Not a League Table
items.title_zh: UPC上诉率与案件分布：欧洲并非排行榜
items.title_en: UPC Appeal Rates and Case Distribution: Europe Is Not a League Table
items.summary: A court of appeal is not a scoreboard, and it is worth saying so plainly at this stage of the debate on the Unified Patent Court. The discussion about how cases are distributed across the UPC’s divisions has lately drifted toward appeal statistics,
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文评论指出，不应将统一专利法院（UPC）视为计分板。尽管上诉统计数据能揭示法律澄清需求及程序压力点，但不能直接衡量各分庭判决质量或用于排名。高上诉率往往反映该分庭处理案件复杂度高或受用户信任，而非司法弱点。数据应用应侧重于理解法院运作，而非构建国家诉讼文化间的竞争叙事。
items.ai_summary_en: This commentary argues that Unified Patent Court appeal statistics should not be used to rank division quality or frame national litigation cultures as competitors. While appeal rates offer valuable empirical data on procedural pressure points and legal clarification needs, they do not measure judicial performance. The debate has shifted from case concentration concerns to misinterpreting reversal rates as quality indicators. Properly analyzed, high appeal volumes reflect areas where the Court of Appeal is actively stabilizing standards for urgency, evidence, and claim construction, rather than indicating first-instance weaknesses. Rights holders are urged to use data for understanding court mechanics instead of creating misleading league tables.
items.ai_insight_zh: 实务中需理性看待UPC各分庭的上诉数据，避免将其简单等同于判决质量优劣。高上诉率可能源于案件疑难程度或当事人对特定分庭的策略性选择。建议持续监控上诉法院对紧急性、证据规则等标准的澄清动态，以理解法律适用趋势，而非仅关注反转率排名。
items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners should interpret UPC appeal data as a map of evolving legal standards rather than a performance metric. High reversal or appeal rates in specific divisions likely signal complex subject matter or unsettled procedural questions, not systemic failure. Strategic portfolio management requires understanding these dynamics to anticipate how the Court of Appeal structures new precedents.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["上诉率可揭示法律澄清需求及程序压力点，但不能直接衡量分庭判决质量", "高上诉率通常反映案件复杂性或用户信任度，易被误读为司法弱点", "利用数据进行法院排名具有误导性，应侧重于理解法院运作机制"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Appeal statistics reveal procedural pressure points but cannot validly measure the quality of specific UPC divisions.", "High appeal rates often indicate intense legal testing and clarification needs rather than first-instance judicial errors.", "Using data to rank divisions misleads stakeholders and obscures the functional role of the Court of Appeal."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["理性解读UPC上诉数据，避免将高上诉率简单等同于低判决质量", "关注上诉法院在紧急性、证据及权利要求解释等方面的标准澄清动态", "观察案件分布背后的用户选择逻辑及程序信心，而非仅看统计排名"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid interpreting high appeal rates at specific divisions as negative quality signals; they often reflect case complexity and active legal development.", "Practice note: Use appeal data to identify where the Court of Appeal is clarifying standards for urgency, evidence, confidentiality, and claim construction.", "What to monitor: Track shifts in case distribution and appeal outcomes to understand procedural confidence and the stabilization of first-instance practices."]
core_points_en: Appeal statistics reveal procedural pressure points but cannot validly measure the quality of specific UPC divisions.
High appeal rates often indicate intense legal testing and clarification needs rather than first-instance judicial errors.
Using data to rank divisions misleads stakeholders and obscures the functional role of the Court of Appeal.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid interpreting high appeal rates at specific divisions as negative quality signals; they often reflect case complexity and active legal development.
Practice note: Use appeal data to identify where the Court of Appeal is clarifying standards for urgency, evidence, confidentiality, and claim construction.
What to monitor: Track shifts in case distribution and appeal outcomes to understand procedural confidence and the stabilization of first-instance practices.

items.title: UPC dispute resolution forum opens with ceremony in Slovenia
items.title_zh: World IP Review：UPC 争议解决中心正式启用，FRAND 与许可纠纷或成早期重点
items.title_en: UPC Mediation and Arbitration Forum Officially Opens in Slovenia
items.summary: The court has officially opened its mediation and arbitration forum, with technology, life sciences and manufacturing companies expected to be among its earliest users—particularly in FRAND and licensing cases.
items.ai_summary_zh: World IP Review 报道称，统一专利法院的调解与仲裁平台已在斯洛文尼亚举行启用仪式并正式开放。摘要指出，科技、生命科学和制造业企业可能成为首批活跃使用者，尤其是在 FRAND 和许可纠纷场景中，该中心有望成为传统诉讼之外的争议解决入口。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court has officially inaugurated its mediation and arbitration forum during a ceremony in Slovenia. This new dispute resolution mechanism is expected to attract early adoption from technology, life sciences, and manufacturing sectors. The source highlights that FRAND and licensing cases are likely to be among the primary use cases for this alternative dispute resolution platform, offering parties a structured avenue outside traditional litigation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 如果该平台能在实际案件中被采用，欧洲专利争议的解决路径可能出现更明确的“诉讼+ADR”分层，尤其会影响 SEP、FRAND 和跨境许可谈判。对企业而言，关键不只是平台开张本身，而是后续是否形成可执行、可保密且与 UPC 诉讼衔接顺畅的程序预期。
items.ai_insight_en: This launch expands the UPC ecosystem by integrating formal ADR options. For rights holders in high-volume licensing sectors, it offers a potential pathway for confidential and efficient resolution. Stakeholders should observe how quickly the forum gains traction and whether it effectively complements ongoing litigation procedures.

items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC mediation and arbitration forum has officially opened following a ceremony in Slovenia.", "Technology, life sciences, and manufacturing firms are anticipated to be early users of the service.", "FRAND and licensing disputes are identified as key areas for initial forum utilization."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC 生态正在从单纯法院体系延伸到配套 ADR 基础设施。", "SEP 和 FRAND 纠纷最可能率先测试该平台的实际吸引力。", "企业应关注 ADR 结果与 UPC 诉讼、保密安排和执行机制的衔接。"]

core_points_en: The UPC mediation and arbitration forum has officially opened following a ceremony in Slovenia.
Technology, life sciences, and manufacturing firms are anticipated to be early users of the service.
FRAND and licensing disputes are identified as key areas for initial forum utilization.

items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: A Strict Stance on Post-Filing Evidence
items.title_zh: EPO T 0655/24决定：对申请后证据采取严格立场
items.title_en: EPO decision T 0655/24: A Strict Stance on Post-Filing Evidence
items.summary: EPO decision T 0655/24 emphasises a strict approach to post-filing evidence for inventive step in antibody patents, highlighting key implications for claim drafting.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局T 0655/24决定在抗体专利创造性审查中，对申请后证据采取严格立场。案件涉及Fc突变体抗体，专利权人提交数据证明三重突变体优于现有技术双重突变体。董事会依据G 2/21标准，强调若效果未包含在原始技术教导中，申请后证据难以被接受。该决定凸显了权利要求撰写中结合序列特征与功能性语言的重要性，并重申组合效应不可简单假设的原则。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案重申G 2/21下申请后证据的可接受性门槛，即依赖的效果必须蕴含于原始公开的技术教导中。对于抗体等实验性强的领域，仅凭申请后数据证明优势风险极高。实务中需确保说明书充分支持所主张的技术效果，并在撰写时通过结构限定缩小范围，以匹配原始披露的发明实质，避免因证据不被采信而丧失创造性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["董事会对利用申请后证据证明创造性采取严格立场，尤其当专利已披露效果时", "权利要求应结合有限序列特征与功能性语言，以避免涵盖不具备发明属性的实施例", "已知突变组合的效果不可简单假设，且在不影响其他属性下获得特定效果亦不可预测"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["申请后证据若用于证明原始披露效果的改进，面临极高的被驳回风险", "权利要求撰写需精确匹配原始说明书中验证过的具体实施例及其技术效果", "需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在G 2/21框架下对生物制药领域证据标准的后续适用"]

This story has developed dramatically over the

items.title: Three Years of the UPC: Selected Decisions from the Third Year of the Unified Patent Court | Grünecker
items.title_zh: Grünecker发布UPC三周年精选判例白皮书，聚焦程序与实体规则成形
items.title_en: Grünecker White Paper: Selected UPC Decisions from the Court’s Third Year
items.summary: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) continues to gain momentum. Now completing its third year, the number of cases filed before the Court continues to increase, underlining the growing importance of UPC case law for European patent practice. In our latest white paper, “The Third Year of the UPC: Some Selected Decisions”, our patent litigation experts […]
items.ai_summary_zh: Grünecker 在 UPC 运行满三周年之际发布白皮书，梳理第三年若干代表性裁判并评估其实务影响。其介绍称，随着案件数量持续增长，UPC 判例对欧洲专利诉讼实践的重要性正进一步提升，白皮书重点覆盖临时措施、证据保全以及程序和实体法律原则如何逐步成形。
items.ai_summary_en: Grünecker has released a white paper analyzing selected decisions from the third year of the Unified Patent Court (UPC). The publication highlights that case filings continue to increase, underscoring the growing importance of UPC case law for European patent practice. Authored by the firm’s patent litigation experts, the analysis assesses the practical implications of recent rulings. Key topics covered include provisional measures and the preservation of evidence. The white paper aims to demonstrate how procedural and substantive legal principles are rapidly evolving and taking shape within the UPC framework, providing a concise overview of current developments and trends in UPC litigation for rights holders and practitioners.
items.ai_insight_zh: 虽然这是一篇带有律所传播属性的白皮书引介，但其可发布价值在于反映市场已把 UPC 判例演进视为需要系统整理的独立知识产品。对企业和代理团队来说，信号很明确: UPC 已从“新法院观察期”进入“规则积累期”，需要把判例跟踪纳入常态化欧洲专利争议管理。
items.ai_insight_en: This publication signals that the UPC is transitioning into a phase of established rule accumulation. For European and US stakeholders, systematic tracking of these emerging precedents is becoming essential for effective portfolio management and litigation preparedness, particularly regarding interim relief mechanisms.

items.title: Testing Italy’s patience: Biogen investigated over alleged abuse in MS treatment market
items.title_zh: 考验意大利耐心：Biogen因涉嫌在多发性硬化症治疗市场滥用地位被调查
items.title_en: Italy Investigates Biogen for Alleged Abuse in Multiple Sclerosis Treatment Market
items.summary: The Italian Competition Authority (ICA) has launched an investigation into whether Biogen has used its blockbuster multiple sclerosis drug Tysabri and a...
items.ai_summary_zh: 意大利竞争管理局（ICA）启动调查，审查Biogen是否利用其多发性硬化症药物Tysabri及配套筛查测试，将生物类似药竞争对手Sandoz排除在市场之外。该案凸显药企利用相邻市场优势阻碍竞争的反垄断风险，以及欧洲当局对该领域的持续高压执法态势。
items.ai_summary_en: The Italian Competition Authority has launched an investigation into Biogen, alleging the company abused its dominant position to exclude biosimilar rival Sandoz from the multiple sclerosis market. The authority focuses on whether Biogen leveraged its Stratify screening test alongside its Tysabri drug to hinder competition. Regulators argue these practices deprived the National Health Service of significant cost savings, as the biosimilar alternative offers at least twenty percent lower costs. This case underscores ongoing antitrust scrutiny in the European pharmaceutical sector, particularly regarding strategies that link proprietary diagnostics with therapeutic products to maintain market exclusivity and block cheaper alternatives.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，意大利后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This investigation highlights persistent antitrust risks for pharmaceutical companies employing bundled diagnostic and therapeutic strategies in Europe. Rights holders should assess how proprietary testing requirements interact with competition law, particularly when facing biosimilar entry. The case reinforces that leveraging dominance in one market to protect another remains a primary enforcement target for European competition authorities.

items.title: Zhuhai CosMX, ATL end IP dispute in court-facilitated settlement
items.title_zh: 珠海冠宇与ATL在法院促成下达成和解
items.title_en: Zhuhai CosMX, ATL end IP dispute in court-facilitated settlement
items.summary: Lasting more than four years, the patent battle was fought in China, the US and Germany, with a recently added trade secret dimension
items.ai_summary_zh: 珠海冠宇（Zhuhai CosMX）与新能源科技（ATL）结束了长达四年多的知识产权纠纷。该专利战在中国、美国及德国三地同时进行，近期还增加了商业秘密维度的争议。双方最终在法院的促成下达成了和解协议，终止了跨国诉讼。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案展示了跨国企业通过多国并行诉讼施压并最终寻求法院促成和解的典型路径。鉴于原文信息有限，仅能确认德国是主要战场之一。需关注此类和解是否涉及全球许可或特定市场禁售令的撤销，以及商业秘密主张对后续技术合作的影响。

items.title: New IViR Study: Towards a Digital Knowledge Act - Mapping Policy Options to Mitigate Legal Risks for Teaching, Learning and Research
items.title_zh: IViR新研究：迈向数字知识法案以缓解教学科研法律风险
items.title_en: New IViR Study: Towards a Digital Knowledge Act - Mapping Policy Options to Mitigate Legal Risks for Teaching, Learning and Research
items.summary: Knowledge institutions – educational establishments, research organisations and cultural heritage institutions – occupy a central position in Europe’s research and innovation ecosystem. Yet their everyday operations are conducted under a regulatory climate characterised by norm complexity and fragmentation leading to considerable legal uncertainty. Exposure to contractual asymmetry and technological control measures further increase chilling effects that may prevent such institutions from fulfil
items.ai_summary_zh: IViR受COMMUNIA委托发布研究，指出欧洲知识机构面临规范复杂与碎片化导致的法律不确定性。合同不对称及技术控制措施加剧寒蝉效应，阻碍公共利益使命履行。研究认为现行欧盟版权例外范围狭窄且易受三步检验法挑战，提议改革以恢复法律结果的可预测性，支持教育、科研及文化遗产工作。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该研究揭示了欧盟版权框架在支持公共知识机构方面的结构性缺陷。实务中需关注合同条款与技术保护措施对法定例外的实际侵蚀效果。后续应监测欧盟是否会基于此研究推动“数字知识法案”或相关指令修订，以明确例外适用的优先地位及限制合同override的法律边界。

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["知识机构在引用版权例外时需警惕合同条款与技术措施的潜在限制", "现行三步检验法的开放性标准增加了权利人对例外适用的挑战空间", "需持续观察欧盟立法者是否采纳研究建议，通过专门立法重构平衡机制"]

items.title: Patent Trends In Seafood And Aquatic Food Products
items.title_zh: 海鲜及水产品领域专利趋势分析
items.title_en: Global Patent Trends in Seafood and Aquatic Food Products: Innovation and Competitive Dynamics
items.summary: The pace of innovation in seafood and aquatic food products has increased dramatically in recent years. A recent analysis of the global patent landscape conducted by member company aera AS shows that the number of patent applications has skyrocketed — from just 80 in 2011 to 4,024 in 2024. The number of granted patents has followed the same trend, with 2,426 approved patents in 2024. This underscores that the industry globally views patenting as a key tool for securing competitive advantage and
items.ai_summary_zh: aera AS分析显示，全球海鲜专利申请量从2011年80件激增至2024年4024件。中国以超9000件申请居首。挪威企业在2020-2022年峰值后活动停滞，面临竞争脆弱性。关键技术包括循环水养殖、加工及高价值成分提取。文章强调挪威需加强IP战略以维持竞争力。
items.ai_summary_en: A recent analysis by aera AS reveals a dramatic surge in global patent activity within the seafood and aquatic food sector. Applications rose from 80 in 2011 to 4,024 in 2024, with granted patents reaching 2,426. China dominates the landscape with over 9,000 cumulative applications, while Norwegian firms show stagnation post-2022. Key innovation areas include sustainable aquaculture systems like RAS, advanced processing techniques such as enzymatic hydrolysis, and high-value marine ingredients including omega-3s. The data underscores patenting as a critical tool for securing competitive advantage, highlighting the need for proactive IP strategies to protect technology and facilitate international market access amidst intensifying global competition.
items.ai_insight_zh: 挪威作为主要海鲜出口国，其专利活动停滞可能削弱长期竞争优势。企业需关注将创新转化为IP资产，特别是在可持续技术和高价值产品领域。监控中国专利布局对欧洲市场准入的潜在影响，以及挪威行业是否调整IP策略以应对全球化竞争。
items.ai_insight_en: For European rights holders, particularly in traditional seafood hubs like Norway, stagnating patent activity amid global growth signals strategic vulnerability. Companies must align IP portfolios with emerging technologies in sustainability and high-value processing to maintain market position. Monitoring dominant filers is essential for assessing freedom-to-operate risks and identifying licensing or collaboration opportunities in an increasingly patent-dense sector.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["全球海鲜专利申请量激增，2024年达4024件，中国以超9000件累计申请主导市场", "挪威企业专利活动在2020-2022年峰值后停滞，面对国际竞争显得更为脆弱", "增长驱动力包括可持续养殖系统、鱼类加工技术及高价值海洋成分开发"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Global seafood patent applications surged from 80 in 2011 to 4,024 in 2024, reflecting intensified industry innovation.", "China leads with over 9,000 cumulative applications, whereas Norwegian patent activity has stagnated following peak years.", "Key growth areas include sustainable aquaculture systems, advanced fish processing, and high-value marine ingredient extraction."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["挪威海鲜行业专利活动停滞，需警惕在国际竞争中因IP保护不足而处于劣势", "可持续养殖与高价值成分提取是专利增长热点，反映行业向绿色和高附加值转型", "需持续观察挪威企业及欧盟同行如何调整IP战略以应对中国主导的全球专利格局"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: European companies in stagnant jurisdictions risk losing competitive edge if IP strategies do not match global innovation rates.", "Practice note: Portfolio reviews should prioritize sustainable aquaculture and high-value ingredient technologies to secure long-term commercial advantages.", "What to monitor: Track Chinese patent grants in processing and RAS technologies to assess potential barriers to European market entry or export."]
core_points_en: Global seafood patent applications surged from 80 in 2011 to 4,024 in 2024, reflecting intensified industry innovation.
China leads with over 9,000 cumulative applications, whereas Norwegian patent activity has stagnated following peak years.
Key growth areas include sustainable aquaculture systems, advanced fish processing, and high-value marine ingredient extraction.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: European companies in stagnant jurisdictions risk losing competitive edge if IP strategies do not match global innovation rates.
Practice note: Portfolio reviews should prioritize sustainable aquaculture and high-value ingredient technologies to secure long-term commercial advantages.
What to monitor: Track Chinese patent grants in processing and RAS technologies to assess potential barriers to European market entry or export.

items.title: Happy 3rd birthday UPC – transitioning towards maturity?
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院三周年：迈向成熟？
items.title_en: Unified Patent Court at Three: Maturing Case Law and Transitional Period Outlook
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）自2023年6月1日运营已满三年，上诉法院已就创造性、充分性等实体及程序问题发布多项指导判决。目前处于七年过渡期，专利权人可选择退出以保留各国法院管辖权。过渡期将于2030年5月结束，是否延长需待2028年咨询后由行政委员会决定。
items.ai_summary_en: Three years after its launch, the Unified Patent Court has seen significant uptake, with its Court of Appeal issuing key decisions on substantive and procedural issues. While the transitional period allows patent owners to opt out of UPC jurisdiction until May 2030, many strategically manage opt-in and opt-out status to control litigation forums. This analysis examines the direction of UPC case law, the future of national litigation for classic European patents, and potential procedural changes as the system transitions toward maturity.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: As UPC jurisprudence stabilizes, rights holders must balance the benefits of pan-European injunctions against the risk of central revocation. Strategic management of opt-out status remains critical for controlling litigation venues. Stakeholders should closely monitor upcoming consultations regarding the potential extension of the transitional period beyond 2030.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院已就创造性、权利要求解释等关键实体及程序问题发布多项重大判决", "过渡期内专利权人可策略性选择退出或重新加入UPC体系，以掌控诉讼管辖权", "过渡期将于2030年5月结束，延长期限决定需基于2028年起的用户咨询与调查"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UPC Court of Appeal has issued major decisions guiding inventive step, sufficiency, and claim construction.", "Patent owners strategically use opt-out and opt-in mechanisms to manage jurisdiction during the transitional period.", "The current seven-year transitional period is scheduled to end in May 2030, subject to potential extension."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院判决正确立关键专利法原则，如创造性与权利要求解释标准", "专利权人利用过渡期规则进行管辖权博弈，需在起诉前精密规划退出与加入时机", "需持续观察2028年咨询结果及行政委员会关于过渡期延长的最终决定"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Balancing the advantage of single-forum enforcement against the risk of central revocation requires careful portfolio assessment.", "Practice note: Strategic timing of opt-in and opt-out actions can influence forum selection and preemptive revocation filings by defendants.", "What to monitor: Watch for administrative committee decisions on extending the transitional period following user consultations starting in 2028."]
core_points_en: The UPC Court of Appeal has issued major decisions guiding inventive step, sufficiency, and claim construction.
Patent owners strategically use opt-out and opt-in mechanisms to manage jurisdiction during the transitional period.
The current seven-year transitional period is scheduled to end in May 2030, subject to potential extension.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Balancing the advantage of single-forum enforcement against the risk of central revocation requires careful portfolio assessment.
Practice note: Strategic timing of opt-in and opt-out actions can influence forum selection and preemptive revocation filings by defendants.
What to monitor: Watch for administrative committee decisions on extending the transitional period following user consultations starting in 2028.

items.title: UPC Weekly - Stroller wheels and the accepted LD test for the doctrine of equivalents
items.title_zh: UPC周报：婴儿车轮案与等同原则测试
items.title_en: UPC Weekly - Stroller wheels and the accepted LD test for the doctrine of equivalents
items.summary: Matthew Naylor reviews the Düsseldorf LD approval and application of The Hague LD equivalence test in Wonderland v. Cybex.
items.ai_summary_zh: Mewburn Ellis分析UPC杜塞尔多夫地方法院在Wonderland诉Cybex案中的判决。该案涉及婴儿车万向轮锁定装置专利EP1905615 B1。法院重点审查了等同原则下的非侵权认定，并应用了海牙地方法院认可的等同测试标准。尽管存在迟交论点等程序争议，裁决核心在于技术特征比对。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案展示了UPC不同分院间在等同原则测试标准上的协调趋势。杜塞尔多夫法院采纳海牙标准，有助于提升法律确定性。实务中需关注法院如何具体拆解机械结构特征进行等同比对，这对撰写高质量权利要求及侵权抗辩具有参考意义。

items.title: Le titre d’une œuvre peut-il être protégé à la fois par le droit d’auteur et le droit des marques ?
items.title_zh: 作品标题能否同时受著作权和商标权保护？
items.title_en: Le titre d’une œuvre peut-il être protégé à la fois par le droit d’auteur et le droit des marques ?
items.summary: Introduction La question de la protection juridique du titre d’une œuvre est l’une des plus complexes en droit de la propriété intellectuelle. Entre droit d’auteur, droit des marques et concurrence déloyale, les régimes de protection se superposent, s’articulent et parfois s’opposent. Comprendre leurs conditions d’application est indispensable pour tout créateur
items.ai_summary_zh: 原文仅包含引言部分，指出作品标题的法律保护是知识产权法中最复杂的问题之一。著作权、商标权及反不正当竞争法的保护制度在此重叠、交织甚至冲突。理解这些制度的适用条件对创作者至关重要。
items.ai_insight_zh: 由于正文缺失，仅能确认文章旨在探讨多重权利叠加的理论框架。需关注后续是否提供法国或欧盟层面的具体判例以明确权利边界。

items.title: Nieuwe regels voor vleesnamen: wat betekent dit voor merken van vleesvervangers?
items.title_zh: 肉类名称新规：对植物肉替代品牌的影响
items.title_en: EU Agreement on Meat Names for Plant-Based Products and Trademark Implications
items.summary: Onlangs hebben het Europese Parlement, de Europese Commissie en de lidstaten een akkoord bereikt over het gebruik van vleesnamen voor plantaardige producten die ter vervanging van vlees worden gebruikt.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟机构就植物基产品使用肉类名称达成协议，旨在防止误导消费者。具体禁止使用指代动物或其部位的术语（如鸡、牛排），但允许使用通用词（如汉堡）。若现有商标包含禁用语，可能无法继续使用，厂商需调整包装并面临品牌知名度损失风险，不过将给予数年过渡期以适应新规。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Parliament, Commission, and Member States have agreed to restrict meat-related terminology for plant-based substitutes to prevent consumer confusion. Specific terms referencing animals or body parts, such as chicken, beef, bacon, or steak, will be prohibited on vegetarian products. However, generic descriptors like burger or sausage remain permissible. This regulatory shift intersects with trademark law, particularly provisions prohibiting marks that mislead the public regarding product nature. Rights holders using protected marks containing banned terms may face restrictions on commercial use, necessitating packaging updates and potential brand adjustments to ensure compliance with the new labeling standards across the European Union.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This agreement creates immediate compliance risks for brands using descriptive meat terminology. While generic terms survive, specific animal references are barred, potentially invalidating the commercial utility of existing trademarks. Companies must audit portfolios for conflicting marks and prepare for rebranding. The interaction between labeling regulations and trademark validity requires careful assessment to avoid misleading the public under Benelux and EU trademark laws.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟禁止在植物基产品上使用指代动物或其部位的具体肉类术语，如鸡、培根等", "允许使用指向产品类型的一般性词汇，如“汉堡”或“香肠”，用于描述素食产品", "含禁用语的已注册商标可能受限，厂商需更换品牌并承担知名度流失成本，但有过渡期"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Specific animal-derived terms like chicken or steak are prohibited for plant-based substitutes.", "Generic product descriptors such as burger or sausage remain allowed for vegetarian items.", "Trademarks containing banned terms may face usage restrictions despite prior registration."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["评估现有商标中是否包含被禁用的动物部位术语，预判注册有效性及使用风险", "监测过渡期具体时长及成员国执行差异，规划品牌重塑与包装更新的时间表", "观察新规实施后消费者认知变化，评估更名对既有品牌市场份额的实际影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Brands using specific meat terms in trademarks or packaging must assess exposure to usage bans and potential loss of brand distinctiveness.", "Practice note: Evaluate existing registrations against Article 7 EUTMR and equivalent Benelux provisions regarding deceptive marks to anticipate enforcement or validity challenges.", "What to monitor: Implementation timelines, transitional periods for existing products, and national enforcement approaches across EU Member States."]
core_points_en: Specific animal-derived terms like chicken or steak are prohibited for plant-based substitutes.
Generic product descriptors such as burger or sausage remain allowed for vegetarian items.
Trademarks containing banned terms may face usage restrictions despite prior registration.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands using specific meat terms in trademarks or packaging must assess exposure to usage bans and potential loss of brand distinctiveness.
Practice note: Evaluate existing registrations against Article 7 EUTMR and equivalent Benelux provisions regarding deceptive marks to anticipate enforcement or validity challenges.
What to monitor: Implementation timelines, transitional periods for existing products, and national enforcement approaches across EU Member States.

items.title: Trade Mark Law & Practice at a Glance – May 2026 - GJE
items.title_zh: 2026年5月商标法律与实务概览
items.title_en: UKIPO Trade Mark Fee Increases Effective April 2026: Key Updates
items.summary: Read our May 2026 trade mark law and practice update, including updates from the UK, EU China, Canada and US
items.ai_summary_zh: GJE发布2026年5月商标法律与实务更新。核心事实为自2026年4月1日起，英国知识产权局（UKIPO）新收费标准生效，整体平均涨幅达25%。具体包括在线提交英国商标申请费由170英镑涨至205英镑，每增加一个类别的费用由50英镑涨至60英镑。
items.ai_summary_en: GJE’s May 2026 trade mark law update highlights significant changes to UK Intellectual Property Office (UKIPO) fees. Effective 1 April 2026, new official fees came into force, representing an average increase of 25 percent across various procedures. Specifically, the cost for filing a UK trade mark application online has risen from GBP 170 to GBP 205. Additionally, the fee for each additional class included in an application has increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60. These adjustments impact the baseline costs for securing trade mark protection in the United Kingdom. Rights holders and applicants managing UK portfolios should note these changes for immediate budgeting and filing planning purposes.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The 25 percent average fee increase materially affects the cost structure for UK trade mark registrations. In-house counsel and brand owners should recalibrate annual IP budgets to accommodate higher filing costs, particularly for multi-class applications. While the base filing fee rise is notable, the incremental cost per additional class also warrants review for portfolio optimization. Practitioners should ensure that client estimates and internal forecasting models reflect these new rates immediately. Monitoring future UKIPO announcements is advisable to determine if these fee adjustments are accompanied by procedural efficiencies or further regulatory changes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年4月1日起UKIPO新费率生效，平均涨幅25%", "英国商标在线申请费从170英镑上调至205英镑", "商标申请每增加一个类别的费用从50英镑上调至60英镑"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["New UKIPO trade mark fees took effect on 1 April 2026 with an average twenty-five percent increase.", "Online UK trade mark application fees rose from GBP 170 to GBP 205 per application.", "Fees for each additional class in a trade mark application increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["英国商标注册成本因官费上调而显著增加", "需关注多类别申请策略在新费率下的经济性变化", "观察后续是否有配套的程序简化或政策补偿措施"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Higher official fees require immediate updates to UK trade mark filing budgets and cost forecasts for rights holders.", "Practice note: The increase in per-class fees may influence decisions on class breadth versus separate filings in portfolio management.", "What to monitor: Future UKIPO communications regarding potential procedural changes or additional fee adjustments in other trademark-related services."]
core_points_en: New UKIPO trade mark fees took effect on 1 April 2026 with an average twenty-five percent increase.
Online UK trade mark application fees rose from GBP 170 to GBP 205 per application.
Fees for each additional class in a trade mark application increased from GBP 50 to GBP 60.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Higher official fees require immediate updates to UK trade mark filing budgets and cost forecasts for rights holders.
Practice note: The increase in per-class fees may influence decisions on class breadth versus separate filings in portfolio management.
What to monitor: Future UKIPO communications regarding potential procedural changes or additional fee adjustments in other trademark-related services.

items.title: Le droit des dessins et modèles communautaires non enregistrés : un instrument de protection des créateurs de bijoux à ne pas négliger
items.title_zh: 欧盟未注册外观设计：珠宝创作者不可忽视的保护工具
items.title_en: Le droit des dessins et modèles communautaires non enregistrés : un instrument de protection des créateurs de bijoux à ne pas négliger
items.summary: Par Maître Morgane Kauffmann et Maître Magali Lorsin-Cadoret Arrêt de la CA Paris, 5-1, 11 mars 2026, n°24/00344 :  Dans un litige opposant la société italienne Bohemian Rhapsodie à une créatrice de bijoux française, la Cour d’appel de Paris a rendu le 11 mars 2026 un arrêt particulièrement riche d’enseignements s’agissant de la protection par […] L’article Le droit des dessins et modèles communautaires non enregistrés : un instrument de protection des créateurs de bijoux à ne pas négliger est a
items.ai_summary_zh: 巴黎上诉法院于2026年3月11日就意大利Bohemian Rhapsodie公司与法国珠宝设计师之间的纠纷作出判决。该案重点阐释了欧盟未注册外观设计（UCD）在保护珠宝创作方面的法律效力与适用条件，为相关权利人提供了重要的司法实践参考。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案凸显了未注册外观设计在快时尚及珠宝行业中的即时保护价值。鉴于原文仅为摘要片段，具体侵权认定标准、独创性门槛及赔偿计算等细节尚不明确，需待全文发布后进一步观察法院对“个别特征”及“公开范围”的具体界定逻辑。

items.title: FDI Screening In Belgian Tech Investments: Navigating Legal Grey Zones
items.title_zh: 比利时科技投资FDI审查： navigating IP资产法律灰色地带
items.title_en: FDI Screening In Belgian Tech Investments: Navigating Legal Grey Zones
items.summary: Foreign direct investment screening rules in Belgium and the EU create uncertainty for investors, particularly in technology deals. This analysis examines when asset transfers involving intellectual property...
items.ai_summary_zh: 自2023年起，比利时特定行业外商直接投资需经跨联邦筛查委员会批准。科技交易常涉知识产权与数据等复杂资产，引发法律不确定性。文章分析资产转让（含IP）若导致控制权变更即可能触发申报，且数据访问与控制亦扩大审查范围，投资者面临合规挑战。
items.ai_insight_zh: 律所分析指出，比利时FDI规则在IP资产与数据控制界定上存在模糊性。实务中需关注“控制权”广义解释对纯IP交易的影响，以及数据合规与国家安全审查的交叉风险，建议持续监测官方指引以明确申报边界。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["涉及知识产权的资产转让若导致控制权变更，即使未收购股份，也可能触发FDI申报义务", "判断是否构成独立业务单元需结合欧盟竞争法等框架，考察是否有专职人员或可分配营收", "涉及个人数据访问或控制的投资显著扩大审查范围，因多数公司均处理某种形式个人数据"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["IP资产剥离或许可若构成独立业务单元，可能被认定为控制权变更从而触发FDI审查", "数据访问权限的授予在FDI语境下被视为敏感因素，需评估其是否落入筛查机制范围", "目前比利时官方指导有限，需结合欧盟竞争法逻辑判断经济实体身份保留情况"]

items.summary: Questel, a global leader in intellectual property (IP) solutions, announce that MicroPort NeuroScientific has selected Questel to support its international intellectual property operations through patent filing, translation, Unitary Patent, and European patent validation (EPV) services.
items.ai_summary_zh: Questel宣布微创神经科学（MicroPort NeuroScientific）选定其支持国际知识产权运营。服务范围涵盖专利申请、翻译、统一专利（Unitary Patent）及欧洲专利验证（EPV）。此举旨在简化流程，确保高质量多语言支持，优化欧洲专利保护策略，减轻行政负担并符合跨司法辖区合规要求。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该合作反映医疗器械企业正通过外包专业服务优化欧洲专利布局，特别是利用统一专利体系降低多国验证成本。实务中需关注服务商对UPC程序及各国过渡期规则的适应能力，以确保权利稳定性。

items.title: Valuing Innovation Under Uncertainty: Damages and Remedies in Life Sciences Arbitration
items.title_zh: 不确定性下的创新估值：生命科学仲裁中的损害赔偿与救济
items.title_en: Valuing Innovation Under Uncertainty: Damages and Remedies in Life Sciences Arbitration
items.ai_summary_zh: Bird & Bird律师在2026年巴黎仲裁周活动中，探讨生命科学仲裁中如何对尚未完全成熟的不确定性资产进行估值。文章指出，此类争议核心在于建立价值、因果关系及可靠评估基础，而非单纯科学或合同解释。随着合作协定增多，里程碑结构与风险分配机制常成为争议焦点，仲裁庭需重构假设情境以量化不确定性本身的价值。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本文系律所对特定仲裁场景下损害赔偿估值方法论的实务观察。重点在于揭示仲裁庭处理未成熟IP资产估值时的逻辑，即从单纯合同解释转向对因果关系和假设情境的重构。对于涉及跨境研发合作的企业，需关注仲裁实践中对不确定性风险的量化趋势，以及合同条款在争议解决中的实际效力边界。

items.title: Patent Litigation in Practice Series: Spotlight on Sweden: Doctrine of Equivalents and the burden of proof
items.title_zh: 瑞典专利诉讼聚焦：等同原则与举证责任
items.title_en: Sweden: Prosecution Amendments and the Doctrine of Equivalents in Patent Litigation
items.ai_summary_zh: 瑞典专利与市场法院上诉法院在PMT 8216-24案中裁定，为克服不支持异议而修改权利要求，不排除适用等同原则。法院区分了克服现有技术与克服新增事项的修改，前者视为放弃保护，后者则否。此外，法院明确等同侵权的举证责任通常由专利权人承担。该判决参考了德国、荷兰等国做法。
items.ai_summary_en: The Swedish Patent and Market Court of Appeal issued its first significant ruling on the doctrine of equivalents since 2016. In case PMT 8216-24, the court clarified that claim amendments made to overcome lack-of-support objections do not preclude equivalent protection. This contrasts with amendments made to overcome prior art, which constitute intentional relinquishment. The decision aligns Swedish practice with approaches in Germany, the Netherlands, and Switzerland, confirming that added-matter corrections are not concessions on scope. Rights holders can thus rely on equivalence even after such procedural adjustments, provided other infringement criteria are met.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，瑞典后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment provides clarity for patent enforcement in Sweden by distinguishing between types of prosecution amendments. It reassures rights holders that compliance with disclosure requirements does not forfeit equivalent protection. Practitioners should note the continued alignment with major European jurisdictions, reducing uncertainty for cross-border portfolio management and litigation strategy involving Swedish patents.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["为克服不支持异议而修改权利要求，不自动排除等同原则的适用", "克服现有技术的修改视为放弃主题，但克服新增事项的修改不视为限制保护范围", "等同侵权虽属法律问题，但基于事实评估，举证责任通常由专利权人承担"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Amendments addressing lack of support do not automatically bar doctrine of equivalents application.", "Prior art amendments imply intentional relinquishment, unlike corrections for added matter objections.", "Swedish approach now aligns with German, Dutch, and Swiss jurisprudence on prosecution history."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确为合规EPC第123(2)条而做的修改仍可能享有等同保护，利于专利权人", "法院区分修改动机，仅克服现有技术的修改才导致禁止反悔，逻辑更精细", "需持续观察该判例在瑞典后续专利侵权诉讼中的具体引用与适用情况"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders retain broader enforcement options in Sweden when claims were amended solely to satisfy support requirements rather than to distinguish prior art.", "Practice note: Distinguish clearly between amendments made for novelty/inventive step versus those for added matter when assessing equivalent infringement risks or opportunities.", "What to monitor: Future Swedish cases applying this distinction to determine how strictly courts scrutinize the intent behind specific prosecution amendments."]
core_points_en: Amendments addressing lack of support do not automatically bar doctrine of equivalents application.
Prior art amendments imply intentional relinquishment, unlike corrections for added matter objections.
Swedish approach now aligns with German, Dutch, and Swiss jurisprudence on prosecution history.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders retain broader enforcement options in Sweden when claims were amended solely to satisfy support requirements rather than to distinguish prior art.
Practice note: Distinguish clearly between amendments made for novelty/inventive step versus those for added matter when assessing equivalent infringement risks or opportunities.
What to monitor: Future Swedish cases applying this distinction to determine how strictly courts scrutinize the intent behind specific prosecution amendments.

items.title: IPEC insights: Easygroup v Easyfeetstore - easyGroup’s claims of…
items.title_zh: IPEC裁定：仅含通用词“easy”不构成商标侵权
items.title_en: IPEC Rules Common Word Easy Insufficient for Trademark Infringement Finding
items.summary: The Intellectual Property Enterprise Court (IPEC) finds that having the common word “easy” is not enough for a finding that EASYFEET infringes easyGroup’s…
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权企业法院裁定，EasyGroup未能证明被告使用“EASYFEET”侵犯其商标权或构成假冒。法官指出，“easy”为描述性词汇，原告虽主张商标家族概念，但长期未能提供证据证明消费者将该前缀单独关联至原告。因缺乏商品相似性及混淆证据，侵权、声誉损害及商标无效主张均被驳回。
items.ai_summary_en: The Intellectual Property Enterprise Court rejected easyGroup’s infringement and passing off claims against Easyfeetstore regarding orthopaedic insoles. The court held that the descriptive term “easy” alone does not establish a link to easyGroup’s brand family. Despite asserting rights across seventy-six prior claims, easyGroup failed to provide evidence that consumers associate the “easy” prefix exclusively with its entities. With no similarity in goods or services for most marks and no evidence of actual confusion, the court found no likelihood of confusion or unfair advantage. Consequently, the associated invalidity claim against Easyfeet’s UK trademark registration was also dismissed, reinforcing the high evidentiary threshold for protecting descriptive elements within large trademark portfolios.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案重申商标纠纷高度依赖具体事实。即便拥有庞大商标家族，若核心要素为描述性词汇且缺乏实际混淆证据，难以通过商标家族理论扩张保护范围。权利人需注重积累市场认知证据，而非仅依赖注册数量。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment highlights the limitations of trademark family doctrines when the common element is highly descriptive. Rights holders must substantiate acquired distinctiveness and consumer recognition with concrete market evidence rather than relying solely on portfolio size. For practitioners, it underscores the necessity of demonstrating actual confusion or a tangible link between marks in infringement actions involving generic prefixes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院认定仅拥有通用词“easy”不足以判定EASYFEET构成侵权，该词具有显著描述性", "原告未能提供证据证明消费者将“easy”前缀视为对其品牌的单独指代，混淆主张失败", "因侵权及假冒主张不成立，基于此提出的被告商标无效宣告请求亦被法院驳回"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Descriptive term easy alone insufficient to prove consumer association with easyGroup brand family without specific evidence.", "Court found no similarity in goods or services and no actual confusion, leading to dismissal of infringement claims.", "Invalidity claim against defendant’s trademark failed as it depended on establishing prior infringement or passing off liability."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["商标家族保护需以核心要素具备显著性及公众认知为基础，描述性词汇难获宽泛保护", "实际混淆证据的缺失往往直接导致侵权及声誉损害主张失败，举证责任关键", "后续应关注权利人在类似案件中是否能补充提交关于消费者认知的实质性市场证据"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Owners of large trademark families containing descriptive terms must actively gather evidence of consumer recognition to enforce rights effectively.", "Practice note: Courts require proof that the common element signals origin specifically to the claimant, not just general brand awareness, to find infringement.", "What to monitor: Future attempts by easyGroup or similar entities to supplement evidentiary records with detailed consumer surveys in subsequent enforcement actions."]
core_points_en: Descriptive term easy alone insufficient to prove consumer association with easyGroup brand family without specific evidence.
Court found no similarity in goods or services and no actual confusion, leading to dismissal of infringement claims.
Invalidity claim against defendant’s trademark failed as it depended on establishing prior infringement or passing off liability.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Owners of large trademark families containing descriptive terms must actively gather evidence of consumer recognition to enforce rights effectively.
Practice note: Courts require proof that the common element signals origin specifically to the claimant, not just general brand awareness, to find infringement.
What to monitor: Future attempts by easyGroup or similar entities to supplement evidentiary records with detailed consumer surveys in subsequent enforcement actions.

items.title: 150 years of the UK trade mark register: iconic brands we represent
items.title_zh: 英国商标注册簿150周年：律所代理的标志性品牌回顾
items.title_en: UK Trade Mark Register at 150: Iconic Brands and Historical Milestones
items.summary: Now that INTA in London has passed, we are reflecting on the historic milestone of the UK trade mark register turning 150.
items.ai_summary_zh: 为纪念英国商标注册簿成立150周年，D Young & Co回顾了自1876年首个商标（Bass红三角）注册以来的历史。文章列举了该律所代理的多个维多利亚时代起源的知名品牌，包括Grants Morella樱桃白兰地、Ardbeg威士忌、Listerine漱口水、Vicks Vaporub、Fairy肥皂、Anusol药品及Gillette剃须刀，并详述了它们在英国的首次注册时间与背景，展示了英国商标体系的长期演变。
items.ai_summary_en: Marking the 150th anniversary of the UK trade mark register, D Young & Co reflects on historic registrations starting with the Bass red triangle in 1876. The firm highlights long-standing client brands such as Grants Morella Cherry Brandy, Ardbeg, Listerine, Vicks Vaporub, Fairy, and Anusol. These examples illustrate the continuity of protection for diverse goods, from spirits to pharmaceuticals, with many marks originating in the Victorian era. The analysis underscores the stability of the UK system, noting that early registrations remain active today alongside millions of newer entries, demonstrating the enduring value of consistent brand protection strategies over decades.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本文主要为律所品牌宣传与历史回顾，通过展示长期代理的经典案例体现专业能力。对于关注英国市场的企业而言，这些百年品牌的持续注册状态证明了英国商标制度的稳定性。实务中可参考此类长寿品牌的维护策略，但文中未涉及具体法律争议或最新审查标准变化，仅作历史性事实陈述。
items.ai_insight_en: This retrospective highlights the longevity of UK trade mark rights, offering reassurance regarding the stability of the register. For rights holders, it emphasizes the strategic value of maintaining historic marks. While primarily illustrative, it reminds practitioners that early adoption of registration provides lasting competitive advantages and brand equity preservation across generations.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国首个注册商标为1876年1月1日注册的Bass红三角，至今有效", "律所代理的最古老商标为1876年注册的Grants Morella樱桃白兰地图形商标", "列举了Ardbeg、Listerine、Vicks等品牌在20世纪初获得英国商标保护的…"]

items.title: Trade Marks With Reputation In The EU - The Requirement Of The Link Between The Signs
items.title_zh: 欧盟声誉商标：标志间“联系”要件解析
items.title_en: Trade Marks With Reputation In The EU - The Requirement Of The Link Between The Signs
items.summary: When does a reputed trade mark benefit from protection beyond likelihood of confusion? Article 8(5) EUTMR grants extended protection, even where the goods or services are dissimilar, provided certain cumulative conditions are met, including the existence of a “link” between the signs.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文探讨欧盟声誉商标在混淆可能性之外获得扩展保护的条件。依据《欧盟商标条例》第8(5)条，即使商品或服务不类似，若满足包括标志间存在“联系”在内的累积条件，即可获保护。作者分析了该“联系”的含义、欧盟判例法确立的评估标准及其与混淆可能性的区别。
items.ai_insight_zh: 对于拥有高知名度商标的权利人，理解“联系”要件是主张跨类保护的关键。实务中需关注欧盟法院如何通过判例细化“联系”的认定标准，以及其与混淆可能性的举证差异，以优化异议或无效策略。

items.title: All In A Name: Why ‘George Orwell’ Cannot Be Registered As A Trademark
items.title_zh: 为何“乔治·奥威尔”无法注册为商标
items.title_en: All In A Name: Why ‘George Orwell’ Cannot Be Registered As A Trademark
items.summary: Registering the name of a famous author as a trademark raises a familiar clash. There is a legitimate commercial interest in licensing a name and stopping third parties from marketing ‘official’ goods that are not, in fact, authorised.
items.ai_summary_zh: 索尼娅·布朗内尔·奥威尔遗产管理方申请将“GEORGE ORWELL”注册为欧盟商标，涵盖书籍、游戏等类别。EUIPO审查员以缺乏显著性和描述性为由驳回。上诉后，大董事会维持驳回，认定该名称对相关公众而言主要指代作者及其作品内容，而非商业来源标识，故依据《欧盟商标条例》第7(1)(b)和(c)条拒绝注册。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了名人姓名在欧盟商标注册中的界限：若公众主要将其视为内容描述而非来源标识，即便存在授权许可的商业利益，仍因缺乏显著性被驳回。企业需注意，商标制度并非控制名人姓名商业化的通用工具，需区分版权、人格权与商标权的保护边界。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EUIPO大董事会认定“GEORGE ORWELL”在指定商品上主要被视为文化参考及内…", "相关公众会将该标志理解为指示商品主题与作者有关，而非识别单一商业来源", "尽管申请人主张保护姓名的合法利益，但商标法功能限于识别来源，不用于控制姓名商业使用"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["名人姓名注册欧盟商标时，若易被公众视为内容描述，将面临绝对理由驳回风险", "商标法旨在识别商业来源，不能单纯作为控制名人姓名商业化授权的法律机制", "需持续观察EUIPO对类似文化名人姓名在各类商品上显著性认定的裁量标准"]

items.ai_summary_en: With over four million registered domain names under the .fr extension, France remains one of Europe’s most active zones for online identifiers. This high volume mechanically generates a steady stream of disputes, ranging from overt cybersquatting to more subtle typosquatting tactics designed to divert web traffic. The source highlights these two primary forms of abuse as key drivers of litigation in the French domain name landscape, necessitating specific procedural responses for rights holders seeking recovery.

Given the prevalence of both direct squatting and confusingly similar variations, understanding the specific evidentiary thresholds for SYRELI and PARL Expert mechanisms is essential for effective portfolio enforcement and traffic protection.

Quantum communication covers technologies that use quantum principles, most notably quantum key distribution to transmit information wi

items.title: Fender Stratocaster: protecting an American icon
items.title_zh: 芬达Stratocaster：保护美国标志性产品
items.title_en: Fender Stratocaster Copyright Protection in Germany: Applied Art and Design Rights
items.summary: Recent reports suggest that American guitar maker Fender has stepped up its legal action to assert intellectual property (IP) rights in...
items.ai_summary_zh: 芬达公司在德国杜塞尔多夫地区法院起诉中国义乌某乐器公司，指控其通过AliExpress在德国销售仿制Stratocaster吉他。法院于2026年3月作出缺席判决，认定Stratocaster琴身设计在德国及欧盟法律下构成应用艺术作品，受版权保护。文章探讨了该判决对长期存在的产品设计维权的意义。
items.ai_summary_en: Fender has intensified enforcement of intellectual property rights for its Stratocaster guitar, including recent litigation in Germany. Reports indicate the Düsseldorf Regional Court ruled in March 2026 that the Stratocaster body shape qualifies as a work of applied art under German and EU copyright law. The default judgment addressed allegations against a manufacturer selling copies via AliExpress. This decision highlights how iconic industrial designs may retain copyright protection long after patent or design rights expire, offering rights holders a potential avenue to combat counterfeits in European markets through copyright rather than registered design claims alone.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment underscores the strategic value of copyright for long-lifecycle products in Europe. Rights holders should note that German courts may protect distinctive aesthetic features as applied art, even when registered designs lapse. Monitoring such precedents is essential for enforcing IP against online marketplaces and foreign manufacturers targeting EU customers.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["杜塞尔多夫地区法院认定Stratocaster琴身设计构成德欧法律下的应用艺术版权作品", "被告未出庭应诉，法院据此作出有利于芬达公司的缺席判决", "芬达针对通过AliExpress向德国销售仿制吉他的中国制造商采取法律行动"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Düsseldorf court recognized Stratocaster body design as protected work of applied art under German law.", "Default judgment issued against defendant selling alleged copies via AliExpress to German consumers.", "Ruling demonstrates viability of copyright claims for classic industrial designs post-design right expiry."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["经典产品设计在专利过期后仍可能通过版权途径在德国及欧盟获得保护", "德国法院对应用艺术版权的认定标准直接影响跨境电商侵权案件的维权效果", "需持续观察该缺席判决是否引发后续上诉或对其他类似设计维权产生判例影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Iconic product shapes may qualify for copyright protection in Germany, extending enforcement options beyond expired design rights.", "Practice note: German courts apply specific thresholds for 'applied art,' requiring distinct aesthetic character separate from technical function.", "What to monitor: Watch for appeals or subsequent cases clarifying the scope of copyright protection for industrial designs in the EU."]

Default judgment issued against defendant selling alleged copies via AliExpress to German consumers.

items.title: Nine Days That Changed A Portuguese Media Brand: How SIC Lost Polígrafo
items.title_zh: 改变葡萄牙媒体品牌的九天：SIC如何失去Polígrafo
items.title_en: Nine Days That Changed A Portuguese Media Brand: How SIC Lost Polígrafo
items.summary: Trademarks in the media industry can be as valuable as the content they represent. This was clearly illustrated in the case of Polígrafo, a Portuguese fact-checking programme, where control over the brand name ultimately determined who could continue using the format.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文分析葡萄牙事实核查节目“Polígrafo”的商标案例。品牌名称控制权决定了谁能继续使用该格式。文章探讨了所有权、合同授权及时间在争议中的决定性作用，说明媒体行业商标价值等同于内容价值。
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注媒体合作中商标权属与合同授权的衔接风险。实务中应明确品牌控制权的转移条件及时间效力，避免因权属不清导致业务中断。建议持续监测此类基于合同与商标权交织的争议判例。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["媒体行业商标价值巨大，品牌名称控制权决定节目格式使用权", "所有权归属、合同授权范围及时间节点在争议中起决定性作用"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["媒体品牌合作需明确商标权属与控制权转移机制", "合同授权条款的时间效力对品牌使用资格具有关键影响", "后续需观察葡萄牙法院对此类商标与合同交叉争议的具体裁决逻辑"]

items.title: AI Patent Drafting: A Blessing And A Curse
items.title_zh: AI专利撰写：机遇与挑战并存
items.title_en: AI Patent Drafting: A Blessing And A Curse
items.summary: From schools to workplaces, from solving complex mathematics problems to helping us remove grass stains from our jeans, artificial intelligence (AI) has found its place in our daily lives and we use it daily to navigate the challenges of living in the XXI century.
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文出自Inventa律所，面向欧盟读者。指出AI工具虽能提升专利检索、摘要及初稿效率，但缺乏法律战略判断力。发明人若过度依赖AI易导致申请文件混乱，强调专利律师在最终审核与权利要求构建中的不可替代性。
items.ai_insight_zh: 实务中需明确AI仅作为辅助工具，不能取代合格专利律师的最终审查。企业应警惕因过度依赖AI导致的申请质量下降及流程延误，保持人工对法律策略和商业目标的主导权。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["AI可自动化常规任务如现有技术检索和文档摘要，提升专利处理效率", "AI无法替代专利律师的战略判断，特别是在权利要求撰写和法律合规方面", "发明人误将AI输出视为专业法律意见，可能导致撰写过程熵增和反馈延迟"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["AI在专利检索和初稿整理中具有效率优势，但缺乏法律战略视角", "需防范发明人直接将AI生成内容作为最终申请文件，避免合规风险", "专利律师的核心价值在于对AI产出进行法律校验与商业化策略调整"]

items.title: PONS IP launches AI, software and quantum tech group
items.title_zh: PONS IP成立人工智能、软件及量子技术业务组
items.title_en: PONS IP Launches AI, Software and Quantum Tech Group in Spain
items.summary: The Spain-based firm has appointed an industry veteran to lead the group, which it hopes will strengthen its ability to support clients in ‘disruptive technologies’
items.ai_summary_zh: 总部位于西班牙的PONS IP宣布成立专门的人工智能、软件和量子技术业务组。该所任命了一位行业资深人士领导该团队，旨在加强其支持客户应对“颠覆性技术”相关知识产权需求的能力。
items.ai_summary_en: Spain-based firm PONS IP has established a new practice group focused on artificial intelligence, software, and quantum technologies. The firm appointed an industry veteran to lead this initiative. This structural change aims to strengthen the firm's capacity to support clients navigating intellectual property matters related to disruptive technologies. The move reflects a targeted effort to address the specific legal needs emerging within these high-growth technical sectors.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，西班牙后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This development highlights a trend among European firms to create specialized units for emerging technologies. For rights holders, it signals increased availability of dedicated expertise in complex fields like quantum computing and AI. Stakeholders should monitor how such specialized groups influence local prosecution practices and client support models in Spain.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["PONS IP成立专注于AI、软件及量子技术的新型业务组", "已任命一位行业资深专家担任该新业务组的负责人", "此举旨在提升律所服务颠覆性技术领域客户的能力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["PONS IP formed a new group for AI, software, and quantum tech.", "An industry veteran was appointed to lead the new practice area."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["律所针对新兴技术领域进行专业化分工的趋势明显", "需关注AI与量子技术在欧洲知识产权保护中的实务难点", "观察该团队后续是否发布相关技术领域的法律指引或案例"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders in disruptive tech sectors may find specialized support structures more aligned with their complex IP portfolios.", "Practice note: Firms are increasingly segmenting services by technology type rather than traditional IP right categories to address sector-specific nuances.", "What to monitor: Observe whether this specialization leads to distinct procedural approaches or published guidance on AI and quantum IP in Spain."]
core_points_en: PONS IP formed a new group for AI, software, and quantum tech.
An industry veteran was appointed to lead the new practice area.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders in disruptive tech sectors may find specialized support structures more aligned with their complex IP portfolios.
Practice note: Firms are increasingly segmenting services by technology type rather than traditional IP right categories to address sector-specific nuances.
What to monitor: Observe whether this specialization leads to distinct procedural approaches or published guidance on AI and quantum IP in Spain.
